author: Sergey Pekarchik
item.angelblock.wolf_rendelite_armor.des: §b§l🎯§r§7 Nether. Protects wolves in extreme heat
Features: When fully broken, any damage → Glowing 5 min
Damage absorption: behaves like Armadillo Wolf Armor (fully absorbs damage from most sources by losing durability)
✎ Fully broken armor remains equipped but loses all protection and immunities
item.angelblock.horse_lymonite_armor.des: Can be found in Jungle Temples or Woodland Mansions
§c§l⚠§r§7 Explosions and Wind Charge bypass armor protection
§a§l✦§r§7 No Powder Snow sinking; Immunity: Freezing, Poison, plant thorns damage
Features: Does not sink in Powder Snow
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc1: §b§l🎯§r§7 Nether. Good protection, wide range of abilities, low durability
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc2: §c§l⚠§r§7 Water, rain (Nausea 10s, Slowness VI 20s); risk to fall through Ice
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: -
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc10: ✎ Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc11: ✎ The more armor a player wears, the higher the chance blocks beneath will break.
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc12: ✎ Ice: 6–50% chance to break, depending on armor pieces.
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc1: §b§l🎯§r§7 Boss fights. Versatile, excellent protection, heavy
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc2: §c§l⚠§r§7 Spider, Silverfish, Bee bites bypass armor; slows player. Ice: may fall through; Netherrack: may break if jumped on
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: -
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc10: ✎ Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc11: ✎ The more armor a player wears, the higher the chance blocks beneath will break.
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc12: ✎ Netherrack: 10–85% chance to break when fall on, depending on armor pieces.
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc13: ✎ Ice and cracked blocks: may collapse even w/o jump (6–50%), 100% on jump.
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc1: §b§l🎯§r§7 Underwater survival. Good protection, sensitive to extreme temperatures
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc2: §c§l⚠§r§7 Fire/Magma/Lava bypass armor and wear 10× faster; Freezing double damage; contact with fire/magma → Wither 30s
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: -
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc10: ✎ Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc11: ✎ Chance to spawn a rare axolotl increases to 1/100 if a player or mob in full set of Aquarite Armor is within 8 blocks
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc12: ✎ Luck may prevent death (25% chance per level), teleporting to saved respawn point with regen and damage protection
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc1: §b§l🎯§r§7 All-purpose. Moderate protection/durability. Wide range of abilities. Suitable for forests, jungles, snow, mountains, caves
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc2: §c§l⚠§r§7 Explosions, Wind Charge bypass armor and wear 10× faster
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc3: §a§l✦§r§7 Regen in rain up to 10 HP. 50% bite protection (spiders, silverfish, bees), 100% freezing. Invisible to creepers >3 blocks
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc7: Regeneration in rain: + (up to 10 HP, at the cost of exhaustion)
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: +
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc10: ✎ Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc11: ✎ Slows nearby attackers; ignites distant ones with 40% chance
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc12: ✎ Luck may prevent death (25% chance per level), teleporting to saved respawn point with regen and damage protection
angelblock.super_armor.desc1: §b§l🎯§r§7 Combines almost all advantages. Best for boss fights and all-purpose
angelblock.super_armor.desc2: §c§l⚠§r§7 Normal visibility to creepers (unlike Lymonite armor)
angelblock.super_armor.desc3: §a§l✦§r§7 Regen in rain up to 10 HP. 100% freezing protection
angelblock.super_armor.desc6: Fire and lava protection: + (100% fire, 95% lava)
angelblock.super_armor.desc7: Regeneration in rain: + (up to 10 HP, at the cost of exhaustion)
angelblock.super_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: +
angelblock.super_armor.desc10: ✎ Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.super_armor.desc11: ✎ Slows nearby attackers; ignites distant ones with 40% chance
angelblock.super_armor.desc12: ✎ When the player is standing on the ground, activating Slow Falling together with Jump Boost grants the Levitation effect. Reactivating Slow Falling disables Levitation
angelblock.super_armor.desc13: ✎ Super Jump activates on a second jump within 1 second after the first. The first jump is normal, allowing you to clear low obstacles without triggering the Super Jump.
angelblock.super_armor.desc14: ✎ Luck may prevent death (25% chance per level), teleporting to saved respawn point with regen and damage protection
angelblock.flying_armor.desc1: §b§l🎯§r§7 Flight and fast travel. Very low protection/durability. Cannot be enchanted
angelblock.flying_armor.desc3: §a§l✦§r§7 Can't fly in Nether, rain, using fireworks, or if chestplate durability <50%
angelblock.flying_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: -
angelblock.flying_armor.desc10: ✎ Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.flying_armor.desc11: ✎ Flight, Slow Falling, and Super Jump require the full armor set

item.angelblock.marine_magnetic_rod.desc: Does the same as Water Rod + has Magnet Mode
item.angelblock.fire_magnetic_rod.desc0: Does the same as Fire Rod + has Magnet Mode
item.angelblock.amethyst_magnetic_rod.de: Does the same as Amethyst Rod + has Magnet Mode
item.angelblock.end_magnetic_rod.desc0: Does the same as Ender Rod + has Magnet Mode
item.angelblock.angel_rod.desc0: Does the same as Magnetic Ender Rod if player is not sitting
item.angelblock.angel_rod.desc2: When hold in a hand or placed on a block it despawns any monsters in 20 block radius
item.angelblock.angel_rod.desc4: ✎ Can be placed on the upside of a block - player should be sitting when uses
item.angelblock.angel_rod.desc5: ✎ The block can be dropped as source items - player should be sitting when drops
item.angelblock.angel_rod.desc6: ✎ Effect radius - how many blocks to the sides from the point of impact are covered by search or attraction
item.angelblock.angel_rod.desc7: ✎ When held in hand, the rod drains the player when interacting with blocks and for each despawned monster.
item.angelblock.angel_rod.desc8: ✎ At 0 durability, the rod does not break but loses its abilities
item.angelblock.planter.desc2: Causes harvesting in area 5x3 blocks per time
item.angelblock.planter.desc4: Plants or fertilizes the most of plants towards the player direction
item.angelblock.planter.desc5: Second hand: seeds, planting stocks, bone meal (to fertilize), shears (to clear grass)
item.angelblock.planter.desc6: Can be crafted or given by a farmer as a gift (1/10 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
item.angelblock.planter.desc7: ✎ Can be enchanted with Fortune to harvest more crops
item.angelblock.planter.desc8: ✎ Using the rod drains the player
item.angelblock.planter.desc9: ✎ At 0 durability, the rod does not break but loses its abilities
item.angelblock.track_layer.desc2: Sequence of blocks drop towards the player direction
item.angelblock.track_layer.desc4: Places blocks a player holds in second hand towards the player direction
item.angelblock.track_layer.desc5: Second hand: redstone, any rails, fences, walls, slabs, carpets
item.angelblock.track_layer.desc7: ✎ Using the rod drains the player
item.angelblock.track_layer.desc8: ✎ At 0 durability, the rod does not break but loses its abilities
item.angelblock.builder.desc3: Places blocks a player holds in second hand towards the player direction
item.angelblock.builder.desc5: Blocks are placed to a cube 3x3x3 with an empty space in the center (to use a destroying potion)
item.angelblock.builder.desc6: Second hand: any solid blocks that are not entities
item.angelblock.builder.desc7: ✎ Falling blocks can only be placed on top of other blocks
item.angelblock.builder.desc8: ✎ Using the rod drains the player
item.angelblock.builder.desc9: ✎ At 0 durability, the rod does not break but loses its abilities

Rendelite Boots + Kit + Strength Pearl → Rendelite Boots with Strength Boost

Lymonite Boots + Kit + Strength Pearl → Lymonite Boots with Jump Boost

Superyte Boots with Sea Power + Kit + Strength Pearl → Superyte Boots with Jump Boost and Sea Power

Enchanted Copper Armor + Kit + Diamond Armor → Enchanted Diamond Armor
Enchanted Iron Armor + Kit + Diamond Armor → Enchanted Diamond Armor
item.angelblock.iron_armor_upgrade_kit.d: Can be found at Ruined Portals
Enchanted Copper Armor + Kit + Iron Armor → Enchanted Iron Armor
item.angelblock.flying_armor_upgrade_kit: Can be found in tanneries and in Suspicious Blocks at Underwater Ruins of the warm ocean
Can be given by a Leatherworker as a gift (1/7 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
Leather Cap + Kit + Aeryte Plate → Aeryte Helmet
Leather Tunic + Kit + Aeryte Plate → Aeryte Chestplate
Leather Pants + Kit + Aeryte Plate → Aeryte Leggings
Leather Boots + Kit + Aeryte Plate → Aeryte Boots
item.angelblock.rendelithic_tool_upgrade: Can be found in villages and Nether Fortresses
Can be given by a weaponsmith or a toolsmith as a gift (1/8 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
Diamond Tool + Kit + Rendelite Ingot → Rendelite Primary Tool
Diamond Weapon + Kit + Rendelite Ingot → Rendelite Primary Weapon
Rendelite Primary Tool + Kit + Flame Stone → Rendelite Enhanced Tool
Rendelite Primary Weapon + Kit + Flame Stone → Rendelite Enhanced Weapon

Can be given by a weaponsmith or a toolsmith as a gift (1/8 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
Netherite Tool + Kit + Diamite Ingot → Diamite Primary Tool
Netherite Weapon + Kit + Diamite Ingot → Diamite Primary Weapon
Diamite Primary Tool + Kit + Strength Pearl → Diamite Enhanced Tool
Diamite Primary Weapon + Kit + Strength Pearl → Diamite Enhanced Weapon

Can be given by a weaponsmith or a toolsmith as a gift (1/8 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
Diamond Tool + Kit + Aquarite Ingot → Aquarite Primary Tool
Aquarite Primary Tool + Kit + Marine Crystal → Aquarite Enhanced Tool

Lymonite Primary Weapon + Kit + Bios Diamond → Lymonite Enhanced Weapon

Superyte Primary Tool + Kit + Super Crystal → Superyte Enhanced Tool

Enchanted Copper Tool + Kit + Diamond Tool → Enchanted Diamond Tool
Enchanted Copper Weapon + Kit + Diamond Weapon → Enchanted Diamond Weapon
Enchanted Iron Tool + Kit + Diamond Tool → Enchanted Diamond Tool
Enchanted Iron Weapon + Kit + Diamond Weapon → Enchanted Diamond Weapon

Enchanted Copper Tool + Kit + Iron Tool → Enchanted Iron Tool
Enchanted Copper Weapon + Kit + Iron Weapon → Enchanted Iron Weapon
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc2: Can be found in Suspicious Blocks at Desert Pyramids and Desert Wells
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc3: Can be given by a cleric as a gift (1/11 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc12: Rod of Terra + Kit + Marine Crystal → Water Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc13: Water Rod + Kit + Flame Stone → Fire Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc14: Fire Rod + Kit + Amethyst Shard → Amethyst Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc15: Amethyst Rod + Kit + Super Crystal → Ender Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc16: Magnetic Rod of Terra + Kit + Marine Crystal → Magnetic Water Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc17: Magnetic Water Rod + Kit + Flame Stone → Magnetic Fire Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc18: Magnetic Fire Rod + Kit + Amethyst Shard → Magnetic Amethyst Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc19: Magnetic Amethyst Rod + Kit + Super Crystal → Magnetic Ender Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc20: Rod of Terra + Kit + Rod Sensor → Magnetic Rod of Terra
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc21: Water Rod + Kit + Rod Sensor → Magnetic Water Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc22: Fire Rod + Kit + Rod Sensor → Magnetic Fire Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc23: Amethyst Rod + Kit + Rod Sensor → Magnetic Amethyst Rod
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc24: Ender Rod + Kit + Rod Sensor → Magnetic Ender Rod
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc1: Downgrades armor, tools, weapons and rods
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc2: When downgrading, one item must be taken manually; others return to the inventory
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc8: Armor (Rendelite, Aquarite, Lymonite, Diamite, Superyte, Aeryte) + Kit + Flint → Downgraded Armor + dropped Armor Plate and possible Upgrade items
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc9: Netherite Armor + Kit + Flint → Diamond Armor + dropped Netherite Ingot
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc11: Animal Armor (Rendelite, Lymonite) + Kit + Flint → Rendelite or Lymonite Plate
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc16: Primary Tool or Weapon (Rendelite, Aquarite, Lymonite) + Kit + Flint → Diamond Tool or Weapon + dropped Ingot
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc17: Enhanced Tool or Weapon (Rendelite, Aquarite, Lymonite) + Kit + Flint → Diamond Tool or Weapon + dropped Ingot and Upgrade Stone
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc18: Primary Tool or Weapon (Diamite, Superyte) + Kit + Flint → Netherite Tool or Weapon + dropped Ingot
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc19: Enhanced Tool or Weapon (Diamite, Superyte) + Kit + Flint → Netherite Tool or Weapon + dropped Ingot and Upgrade Stone
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc20: Netherite Tool or Weapon + Kit + Flint → Diamond Tool or Weapon + dropped Netherite Ingot
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc22: Rod (Water, Fire, Amethyst, End) + Kit + Flint → Downgraded Rod + dropped Upgrade Stone
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc23: Magnetic Rod (Water, Fire, Amethyst, End) + Kit + Flint → Downgraded Rod + dropped Upgrade Stone and Rod Sensor
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc24: Rod of Terra + Kit + Flint → 2 Bamboo Sticks + dropped Bios Diamond
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc25: Magnetic Rod of Terra + Kit + Flint → 2 Bamboo Sticks + dropped Bios Diamond and Rod Sensor
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc26: Planter + Kit + Flint → Rod of Terra + dropped Nautilus Shell and Dispenser
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc27: Track Layer + Kit + Flint → Water Rod + dropped Fishing Rod and Piston
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc28: Builder + Kit + Flint → Amethyst Rod + dropped Strength Pearl and Piston
item.angelblock.obsidian_powder.desc: Can be got from Cracked Obsidian
item.angelblock.endstone_powder.desc1: Turns Lava source into End Stone
item.angelblock.endstone_powder.desc2: Can be got from Cracked End Stone
item.angelblock.diamond_powder.desc: Can be got by breaking Diamond Blocks with Splash Destroying Potion
item.angelblock.saltpeter.desc: Can be got by breaking Tuff by Splash Destroying Potion or by Ender Rod
item.angelblock.energy_fiber.desc: Fiber reinforced with Ender Rod compound
item.angelblock.vesicular_terracotta.des: Can be found in Desert Pyramids
item.angelblock.energy_crystal.desc: When held in hand, grants Speed 4 and Haste 1 effects
item.angelblock.flax_fibre.desc: Can be found in Jungle Temples or Woodland Mansions
item.angelblock.strength_pearl.desc1: If in offhand use Ender Rod to evoke thunder
item.angelblock.strength_pearl.desc2: Can be found in Pillager Outpost, Mineshafts and Dangeons
item.angelblock.bios_diamond.desc1: Using it sets Absorption effect I-V for 2-10 seconds
item.angelblock.bios_diamond.desc2: Can be found in Jungle Temples or drop from Green Diamond Ore blocks
item.angelblock.bios_diamond.desc3: Can be used as an armor trim material
item.angelblock.end_sapphire.desc1: Using it sets a random Levitation effect within [0..50] level for 2-15 seconds
item.angelblock.end_sapphire.desc2: Can be found in End Cities
item.angelblock.flame_stone.desc1: If in offhand use Ender Rod for clear weather
item.angelblock.flame_stone.desc2: Can be found in Nether Fortresses
item.angelblock.marine_crystal.desc0: If in mainhand use on living beings to remove all effects
item.angelblock.marine_crystal.desc1: If in offhand use Ender Rod to evoke rain
item.angelblock.marine_crystal.desc3: Can be found in Ocean Ruins
item.angelblock.guardian_eye.desc2: The effect lasts while the Eye is held in either hand
item.angelblock.guardian_eye.desc3: Can drop from a killed Elder Guardian (35% chance, +15% per Looting level)
item.angelblock.miner_figure.desc1: Using it near piglins (16 blocks radius) makes them calm
item.angelblock.miner_figure.desc2: Can be found in Mineshafts and Dangeons
item.angelblock.evoker_amulet.desc2: Allays vanish if far away and not renamed or holding an item
item.angelblock.evoker_amulet.desc3: Can be found in Woodland Mansions
item.angelblock.ancient_scroll.desc: Can be found in Stronghold libraries
item.angelblock.blue_axolotl_bucket.desc: Can be given by a farmer as a gift (1/100 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
item.angelblock.horse_armor_handbook.des: Can be found in Stronghold libraries
The Handbook + Armor Upgrade Kit: Lymonite Upgrade + Lymonite Plate → Lymonite Horse Armor
The handbook is not consumed in crafting
item.angelblock.wolf_armor_handbook.desc: Can be found in Stronghold libraries
The Handbook + Armor Upgrade Kit: Rendelite Upgrade + Rendelite Plate → Rendelite Wolf Armor
The handbook is not consumed in crafting
Can be found in Stronghold libraries
Describes a marine creature unknown to this world
The diagrams are detailed, yet impossible to interpret
The handbook seems out of place
item.angelblock.green_diamond_ore.desc: Use the Rod of Terra on Diamond Ore to turn it into the Green Diamond Ore
item.angelblock.inactive_angel_block.des: Use an Echo Shard to awaken the block
Once awakened, despawns any monsters within 70 blocks
The Echo Shard is not consumed when awakening the block
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc1: Despawns monsters within 70 blocks once awakened
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc3: ✸ After using an item on the block, the block stops removing corresponding monsters:
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc5: Coal: Wither Skeleton           Totem of Undying: Evoker
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc6: Rotten Flesh: Any Zombie        Saddle: Ravager
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc7: Wheat: Zombie Villager          Ender Pearl: Enderman
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc8: Gun Powder: Creeper            Resin Clump: Creaking
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc9: Glass Bottle: Witch             Shulker Shell: Shulker
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc11: Spider Eye: Cave Spider        Blaze Rod: Blaze
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc12: Slime Ball: Slime               Fire Charge: Ghast
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc13: Magma Cream: Magma Cube        Prismarine Shard: Guardian
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc14: Gold Nugget: Pigline            Wet Sponge: Elder Guardian
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc15: Gold Ingot: Pigline Brute       Skulk Catalyst: Warden
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc16: Pork Chop: Hoglin              Wither Rose: Wither
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc17: Phantom Membrane: Phantom      End Crystal: Ender Dragon
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc18: Echo Shard: resets the filter - block removes ANY monsters again
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc19: ✎ Using the item again will remove the corresponding monster from the filter if it has already been added
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc20: §2The item used on the block is NOT consumed
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc21: The block's color changes depending on the number of monsters added to the filter:
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc22: Dark blue – the block is dormant (does not remove monsters)
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc23: Blue – the filter is empty (the block removes ANY monsters)
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc28: ✎ After placement, the block starts awakening
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc29: ✎ Awakening takes one full in-game day (12s on Peaceful difficulty)
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc31: ✎ If more than 4 monsters are added to the filter, the block becomes dormant and must be awakened with an Echo Shard
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc33: Totem of Undying + Magnetic Ender Rod + The Block of Angel → The Rod of Angel
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc1: Prevents deaths of monsters in 70 block radius
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc3: ✸ Using the items on the block spawns corresponding monster in 30 block radius:
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc6: Rotten Flesh: Zombie           Totem of Undying: Evoker
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc9: Gun Powder: Creeper           Ender Pearl: Enderman
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc10: Glass Bottle: Witch            Resin Clump: Creaking
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc12: Spider Eye: Cave Spider       Breeze Rod: Breeze
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc13: Slime Ball: Slime              Blaze Rod: Blaze
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc14: Magma Cream: Magma Cube       Fire Charge: Ghast
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc15: Gold Nugget: Pigline           Phantom Membrane: Phantom
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc16: Gold Ingot: Pigline Brute       Prismarine Shard: Guardian
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc18: §2The item used on the block is consumed!
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc19: ✨ The placed block gradually changes surrounding blocks:
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc21: Dirt, Farmland, Dirt Path, Clay → Mud
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc22: Sand → Clay (if under water), End Stone or Terracotta
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc24: Stone → Infested Stone or Mossy Cobblestone
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc25: Cobblestone → Infested Cobblestone or Mossy Cobblestone
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc28: Obsidian → Crying Obsidian or Cracked Obsidian
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc36: ✎ Affects blocks within a 18-block horizontal radius, provided there is air, water or a plant above them
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc37: ✎ On Peaceful difficulty, surrounding blocks are not affected
item.angelblock.angel_rod_block.desc1: When hold in a hand or placed on a block it despawns any monsters in 20 block radius
item.angelblock.angel_rod_block.desc2: The block can be dropped as source items - player should be sitting when drops
item.angelblock.gunpowder_block.desc: Explodes after falling, hit or fired
item.angelblock.nether_bars_block.desc1: Can be found in Bastion Remnants
item.angelblock.block_breaker_potion_ite: §3§l⚗ Brewing Recipe:§r§3 Prismarine Shard, Splash Awkward Potion
White Wool: 2-4 Strings and 0-2 Bone Meals
✎ Destroys diamond armor on armor stand and mobs. Drops Diamond Powder
item.angelblock.soaring_spore_essence.de: Used to grant the armor the ability to highlight the player and enable slow falling
When used on living beings, it applies infinite Glowing and Slow Falling effects
§3§l⚗ Brewing Recipe:§r§3 Froglight, Potion of Slow Falling
advancements.angelblock.root.title: The Block of Angel
advancements.angelblock.root.description: Explore the world. Discover its hidden powers.
advancements.angelblock.first_artifact.d:
Some treasures are meant to be used, not stored.
§7Obtain your first artefact.
advancements.angelblock.magic_rod.title: A Whisper Answered
advancements.angelblock.magic_rod.descri:
You reach out — and something answers from beneath your feet.
§7Obtain your first rod.
advancements.angelblock.magnetic_rod.des:
You begin to sense what lies hidden within the stone.
§7Obtain a Magnetic Rod.
advancements.angelblock.aeryte_armor.des:
You trade safety for speed.
§7Obtain a full set of Aeryte Armor.
advancements.angelblock.lymonite_armor.d:
Nature no longer resists you.
§7Obtain a full set of Lymonite Armor.
advancements.angelblock.aquarite_armor.t: Get out of the water, you're blue already!
advancements.angelblock.aquarite_armor.d:
The ocean opens before you.
§7Obtain a full set of Aquarite Armor.
You walk where others burn.
§7Obtain a full set of Rendelite Armor.
advancements.angelblock.diamite_armor.de:
Little can break you now.
§7Obtain a full set of Diamite Armor.
advancements.angelblock.superyte_armor.t: Burn it. Drown it. Still here.
advancements.angelblock.superyte_armor.d:
The world throws everything at you — and fails.
§7Obtain a full set of Superyte Armor.
advancements.angelblock.devil_block.desc:
You no longer wait for danger. You summon it.
§7Place the Block of Devil.
advancements.angelblock.angel_block.desc:
Danger stops at the edge of your domain.
§7Awaken the Block of Angel.
advancements.angelblock.angel_rod.title: Silence Between Steps
advancements.angelblock.angel_rod.descri:
Monsters no longer breathe down your neck. It’s time to listen to the world.
§7Obtain the Rod of Angel.
advancements.angelblock.prismarine_shard:
A simple fragment — the beginning of change.
§7Obtain a Prismarine Shard.
advancements.angelblock.destroying_potio:
Structure gives way. The world forgets what it was.
§7Brew a Splash Destroying Potion.
advancements.angelblock.diamond_powder.d:
The result of something that used to be solid.
§7Obtain Diamond Powder.
advancements.angelblock.cracked_block.de:
Even stone starts to complain under heat.
§7Fire End Stone or Obsidian in a furnace.
advancements.angelblock.cracked_block_po:
Some structures cannot endure their altered state.
§7Break Cracked End Stone or Cracked Obsidian with a pickaxe.
advancements.angelblock.new_materials.de:
Something greater is taking shape.
§7Combine components to create a new material.
advancements.angelblock.aeryte_mixture.d:
It does not make you stronger. It hints that gravity is not absolute.
§7Obtain an Aerite Mixture.
advancements.angelblock.first_crystal.de:
A fragment of power awaits a purpose.
§7Obtain your first crystal.
advancements.angelblock.enhanced_sword.d:
It no longer just cuts — it answers your will.
§7Enhance a sword using a crystal.
advancements.angelblock.enhanced_tool.de:
The world no longer yields block by block — it retreats in leaps.
§7Enhance a tool using a crystal.
description.rods.press_shift: §7Press §9Shift§7 to display information about block usage...
description.rods.press_alt: §7Press §9Alt§7 to display information about block transformation...
description.rods.no_magnet_mode: Upgrade the rod with Rod Sensor to unlock Magnet Mode
description.rods.magnet_mode.ancient_rod: ✎ The rod pulls ore blocks to the surface, except for Diamond Ore. Ore can only pass through Stone, Cobblestone, Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Tuff. When detecting Diamond Ore, Rails (Abandoned Mineshafts), Sculk, Calcite, and Smooth Basalt (Amethyst Geodes), a distinct sound is played, similar to a metal detector
description.rods.magnet_mode.fire_rod: ✎ The rod pulls ore blocks to the surface, except for Diamond Ore. Ore can only pass through Stone, Cobblestone, Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Tuff, Netherrack, Basalt, Blackstone, Magma. When detecting Diamond Ore, Rails (Abandoned Mineshafts), Sculk, Calcite, and Smooth Basalt (Amethyst Geodes), a distinct sound is played, similar to a metal detector
